name: WW-Chicken and Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 packet instant chicken broth and seasoning mix
2 ounces Monterey jack cheese or cheddar cheese, shredded
4 ounces skinned and boned chicken, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat margarine until bubbly and hot.
2. Add celery, onion, and carrot; cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender.
3. Add flour and stir quickly to combine.
4. Gradually stir in water.
5. Add broth mix and, stirring constantly, bring to a boil.
6. Add peas and cook for 3 minutes.
7. Reduce heat and add milk and cheese; cook, stirring constantly, until cheese is melted.
8. Add remaining ingredients and cook, stirring constantly, until thoroughly heated.
Each serving provides: 3 protein exchanges; 1 bread exchange; 1 1/2 vegetable exchange; 1 fat exchange; 1/4 milk exchange; 15 calorie exchange.
Per serving: 395 calories; 31 grams protein; 17 grams fat; 29 grams carbohydrate; 893 milligrams sodium; 52 milligrams cholesterol.
Diced turkey may be substituted for the chicken.
Per serving: 383 calories; 31 grams protein; 15 grams fat; 29 grams carbohydrate; 886 milligrams sodium; 45 milligrams cholesterol.
